title: Opinion: Opinion | There's A Bigger Plan Behind UAE's Exit From OPEC - One In Force For Years Now
summary_full: Surprising as the UAE's decision is, it is also fully in keeping with its pattern of breaking with regional, in particular, Arab consensus on many issues and forging an independent path.
summary_public: Surprising as the UAE's decision is, it is also fully in keeping with its pattern of breaking with regional, in particular, Arab consensus on many issues and forging an independent path.
